#include <skl_mpg4.h>

SKL_GMC_DSP * GMC_Dsp

Detailed Description

SKL_MP4_INFOS is used to share informations between the bitstream-coding core (instance of SKL_MP4_ENC) and the frame analyzer (instance of SKL_MP4_ANALYZER)

Member Function Documentation

SKL_MEM_I* SKL_MP4_INFOS::Set_Memory_Manager (  SKL_MEM_I *  mem  ) 
 

mem=0 => use C++ heap
